title: senecio mayurii
intro: Senecio mayurii, also known as the Mayuri Senecio, is a rare and endangered plant species native to the Western Ghats mountain range in India. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Senecio mayurii include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves can also be crushed and applied topically to affected areas to harness its medicinal benefits.
